text: Hey! Thanks for reaching out. I'm interested in the 2014 Wrangler Sport. Before I dig deeper, I have a few quick questions: Has this Jeep been in any accidents? And with 118k on the odometer, how has the maintenance been — any major work done recently, or anything I should know about?

speaker: seller

args.message: Accidents? No, not this beauty! She's clean as a whistle. And 118k miles? That's barely broken in for one of these legendary Jeeps. The previous owner was meticulous, a real enthusiast. We've got all the service records showing regular oil changes and tune-ups. Honestly, it runs like a top – you can feel the power from that 3.6L V6 the moment you start it up. It's trail-rated and ready to roll!

speaker: seller

args.message: The transmission is smooth as can be! Shifts like a dream, no hesitation, no slipping, none of that. It feels tight and responsive, just like you'd expect from a well-cared-for Jeep. Honestly, it's one of the best-feeling transmissions I've encountered in a vehicle with this mileage. We haven't had to touch the fluid recently; it's been running so well we haven't needed to worry about it. We stand by this one!
